items.title: Spain dominate Austria, advance to round of 16
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Dressed for success, Fritz advances at Wimbledon
items.summary: A well-dressed Taylor Fritz impressed again, beating compatriot Patrick Kypson 6-2, 6-2, 7-5 to reach the third round at Wimbledon on Thursday.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: America 250 road trips! Journey into the mystery and magic of sports
items.summary: Join five ESPN writers as they travel across the country on an America 250 quest to discover the mystery and magic of sports.
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.
